name: kemu.io.ai-agent
title: AI Agent
description: Define AI agents and tools for automated workflows

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: Configuration object containing query, attachments, sessionId, and systemInstructions. Can also be a string to be used as query or a boolean to trigger processing.

outputs.name: reasoning
outputs.description: Reasoning output from models that support extended thinking

outputs.name: debug
outputs.description: Includes debugging information for when things go wrong, including stopping reason

author: 0f998d5a-a8ce-4bf8-9f84-fa8c481cb40b

defaultVariantInfo.title: Agent
defaultVariantInfo.description: AI agent that processes queries with system instructions and attachments

variants.name: Chat Interface
variants.description: Chat window UI that can invoke an Agent and display live outputs

variants.name: Tool
variants.description: Define tools with arguments and results for AI agents

variants.name: Submit
variants.description: Submits data back to the agent after a tool execution or history retrieval

variants.name: History
variants.description: Manage conversation history and session storage for AI agents

outputs.name: getHistory
outputs.description: Invoked when the agent needs to retrieve the conversation history

outputs.name: updateHistory
outputs.description: Invoked when the agent needs to update the conversation history
